name: cantik-ai-monorepo
description: Cantik AI - Multi-platform Skin Analysis System

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=backend && npm install --workspace=platforms/pwa && npm install --workspace=platforms/admin && npm install --workspace=platforms/kiosk && npm install --workspace=platforms/desktop
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:pwa" "npm run dev:kiosk" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.dev:fresh: npm run dev:stop && npm run dev:all
scripts.build:all: npm run build:pwa && npm run build:admin && npm run build:kiosk && npm run build:desktop
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:init && npm run db:seed
